eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 12:23 AM ON APR 25, 2026 Effective until 08:23 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. A Safe Alert has been issued for Maricopa County. The Glendale Police Department is looking for 78 year old Judith Lee Ross.  Judith is a white female, 5 feet 9 inches tall, 180 pounds, with gray hair and hazel eyes.  Judith was last seen at 5:30 PM on 4/24/26 driving her vehicle near West Thunderbird Avenue and North 51st Avenue in Glendale, Arizona.  Her vehicle is described as a red in color 2019 Honda Fit bearing and Arizona plate of CSE1457.  She is believed to be wearing a red long sleeve shirt and black leggings.  Judith suffers from a medical condition which may cause him to become disoriented or easily confused.  If you have seen Judith, please contact the Glendale Police Department at 623 930 3000 or call 911. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
